Zombieland: Double Tap (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $73,118,130Details
International Box Office $52,094,888
Worldwide Box Office $125,213,018
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,758,763
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,914,086
Total $16,672,849
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a fight between Columbus and Wichita creates a deep rift in the make-shift family that causes Little Rock to leave with a strange man, the group must band together to find Little Rock and mend the family ties. Facing new kinds of zombies along the way, the group are forced to adjust their strategies until they find an incredible new zombie hunter known only as Nevada.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$26,803,104 (36.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.73 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$48,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,468 opening theaters/3,468 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $95,468,105

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 18th, 2019 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: October 9th, 2019 (Wide) (Taiwan)
October 16th, 2019 (Wide) (Trinidad)
October 17th, 2019 (Wide) (Iraq)
October 17th, 2019 (Wide) (Israel)
October 17th, 2019 (Wide) (Aruba)
Video Release: December 24th, 2019 by Columbia Pictures Home Entertainment
February 24th, 2020 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: R for bloody violence, language throughout, some drug and sexual content.
(Rating bulletin 2596 (Cert #51942), 9/18/2019)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Franchise: Zombieland
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fictionalized Version of Yourself, Legacy Sequel
Plot point: Road Trip, Romance, Zombies
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Pariah Productions, 2.0 Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After a fight between Columbus and Wichita creates a deep rift in the make-shift family that causes Little Rock to leave with a strange man, the group must band together to find Little Rock and mend the family ties. Facing new kinds of zombies along the way, the group are forced to adjust their strategies until they find an incredible new zombie hunter known only as Nevada.
